trans-unit.source: Adds a client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.
trans-unit.target: Adds a client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.

trans-unit.source: all
trans-unit.target: all

trans-unit.source: Adds a package reference to a project.
trans-unit.target: Adds a package reference to a project.

trans-unit.source: Path to the dependency graph file to be used to restore preview and compatibility check.
trans-unit.target: Path to the dependency graph file to be used to restore preview and compatibility check.

trans-unit.source: Frameworks for which the package reference should be added.
trans-unit.target: Frameworks for which the package reference should be added.

trans-unit.source: Allow the command to block and require manual action for operations like authentication.
trans-unit.target: Allow the command to block and require manual action for operations like authentication.

trans-unit.source: Do not perform restore preview and compatibility check. The added package reference will be unconditional.
trans-unit.target: Do not perform restore preview and compatibility check. The added package reference will be unconditional.

trans-unit.source: Directory to restore packages in.
trans-unit.target: Directory to restore packages in.

trans-unit.source: Id of the package to be added.
trans-unit.target: Id of the package to be added.

trans-unit.source: Allows prerelease packages to be installed.
trans-unit.target: Allows prerelease packages to be installed.

trans-unit.source: Version of the package to be added.
trans-unit.target: Version of the package to be added.

trans-unit.source: Path to the project file.
trans-unit.target: Path to the project file.

trans-unit.source: Specifies NuGet package sources to use during the restore.
trans-unit.target: Specifies NuGet package sources to use during the restore.

trans-unit.source: user specified
trans-unit.target: user specified

trans-unit.source: Add a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Add a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Add a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Add a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Allows pushing to HTTP sources (insecure).
trans-unit.target: Allows pushing to HTTP sources (insecure).

trans-unit.source: The API key for the server.
trans-unit.target: The API key for the server.

trans-unit.source: NuGet Command Line
trans-unit.target: NuGet Command Line

trans-unit.source: Key '{0}' not found.
trans-unit.target: Key '{0}' not found.

trans-unit.source: ALL: Get all merged NuGet configuration settings from multiple NuGet configuration files that will be applied, when invoking NuGet command from the working directory path. CONFIG_KEY: Get the effective value of the specified configuration settings of the config section.
trans-unit.target: ALL: Get all merged NuGet configuration settings from multiple NuGet configuration files that will be applied, when invoking NuGet command from the working directory path. CONFIG_KEY: Get the effective value of the specified configuration settings of the config section.

trans-unit.source: Gets the NuGet configuration settings that will be applied.
trans-unit.target: Gets the NuGet configuration settings that will be applied.

trans-unit.source: Indicate that the NuGet configuration file path will be shown beside the configuration settings.
trans-unit.target: Indicate that the NuGet configuration file path will be shown beside the configuration settings.

trans-unit.source: Lists the paths to all NuGet configuration files that will be applied when invoking NuGet command in a specific directory
trans-unit.target: Lists the paths to all NuGet configuration files that will be applied when invoking NuGet command in a specific directory

trans-unit.source: Specifies the directory to start from when listing configuration files. If not specified, the current directory is used.
trans-unit.target: Specifies the directory to start from when listing configuration files. If not specified, the current directory is used.

trans-unit.source: Set the value of a specified NuGet configuration setting.
trans-unit.target: Set the value of a specified NuGet configuration setting.

trans-unit.source: The key of the settings that are to be set.
trans-unit.target: The key of the settings that are to be set.

trans-unit.source: The value of the settings that are to be set.
trans-unit.target: The value of the settings that are to be set.

trans-unit.source: Removes the key-value pair from a specified NuGet configuration setting.
trans-unit.target: Removes the key-value pair from a specified NuGet configuration setting.

trans-unit.source: The key of the settings that are to be removed.
trans-unit.target: The key of the settings that are to be removed.

trans-unit.source: The key "{0}" could not be found in config section, so it could not be unset.
trans-unit.target: The key "{0}" could not be found in config section, so it could not be unset.

trans-unit.source: NuGet configuration CLI
trans-unit.target: NuGet configuration CLI

trans-unit.source: y
trans-unit.target: y

trans-unit.source: DefaultThreadCurrentUICulture value: {0}
trans-unit.target: DefaultThreadCurrentUICulture value: {0}

trans-unit.source: Deletes a package from the server.
trans-unit.target: Deletes a package from the server.

trans-unit.source: Please provide arguments for package id and package version.
trans-unit.target: Please provide arguments for package id and package version.

trans-unit.source: The Package Id and version.
trans-unit.target: The Package Id and version.

trans-unit.source: Disable buffering when pushing to an HTTP(S) server to decrease memory usage.
trans-unit.target: Disable buffering when pushing to an HTTP(S) server to decrease memory usage.

trans-unit.source: Disable a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Disable a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Disable a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Disable a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Enable a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Enable a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Enable a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Enable a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value provided for '{0}'. The accepted values are {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value provided for '{0}'. The accepted values are {1}.
trans-unit.note: {0} - argument name in SignCommand. e.g. certificate storeName, certificate storelocation, hashAlgorithmName {1} - the possible values of the argument.

trans-unit.source: Item '{0}' for '{1}' in Imported file '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: Item '{0}' for '{1}' in Imported file '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - ItemType {1} - Package Id {2} - Imported File Path

trans-unit.source: Error while performing {0} for package '{1}'. Cannot edit items in imported files - {2}{3}
trans-unit.target: Error while performing {0} for package '{1}'. Cannot edit items in imported files - {2}{3}
trans-unit.note: {0} - Operation Name {1} - packageId {2} - New line (this is just to hold a new line between sentences. does not need any translation) {3} - Error string

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' is incompatible with '{1}' frameworks in project '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' is incompatible with '{1}' frameworks in project '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Package Id {1} - all / user specified {2} - Project Path

trans-unit.source: Failed to add a PackageReference for '{0}'. A ProjectReference with the same name already exists and a package with the same name cannot be added to the project.
trans-unit.target: Failed to add a PackageReference for '{0}'. A ProjectReference with the same name already exists and a package with the same name cannot be added to the project.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find a resolved package for '{0}'. This is a tooling error. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home.
trans-unit.target: Unable to find a resolved package for '{0}'. This is a tooling error. Please file an issue at https://github.com/NuGet/Home.

trans-unit.source: VersionOverride for package '{0}' should not be empty.
trans-unit.target: VersionOverride for package '{0}' should not be empty.

trans-unit.source: Package reference for package '{0}' defined in incorrect location, PackageReference should be defined in project file.
trans-unit.target: Package reference for package '{0}' defined in incorrect location, PackageReference should be defined in project file.

trans-unit.source: PackageVersion for package '{0}' defined in incorrect location, PackageVersion should be defined in Directory.Package.props.
trans-unit.target: PackageVersion for package '{0}' defined in incorrect location, PackageVersion should be defined in Directory.Package.props.

trans-unit.source: No assets file was found for `{0}`. Please run restore before running this command.
trans-unit.target: No assets file was found for `{0}`. Please run restore before running this command.

trans-unit.source: Failed to obtain a search resource.
trans-unit.target: Failed to obtain a search resource.

trans-unit.source: The packages {0} are implicitly referenced. You do not typically need to reference them from your project or in your central package versions management file. For more information, see https://aka.ms/sdkimplicitrefs
trans-unit.target: The packages {0} are implicitly referenced. You do not typically need to reference them from your project or in your central package versions management file. For more information, see https://aka.ms/sdkimplicitrefs

trans-unit.source: Centrally defined floating package versions are not allowed.
trans-unit.target: Centrally defined floating package versions are not allowed.

trans-unit.source: The PackageReference items {0} do not have corresponding PackageVersion.
trans-unit.target: The PackageReference items {0} do not have corresponding PackageVersion.

trans-unit.source: The package reference {0} specifies a VersionOverride but the ability to override a centrally defined version is currently disabled.
trans-unit.target: The package reference {0} specifies a VersionOverride but the ability to override a centrally defined version is currently disabled.

trans-unit.source: Projects that use central package version management should not define the version on the PackageReference items but on the PackageVersion items: {0}
trans-unit.target: Projects that use central package version management should not define the version on the PackageReference items but on the PackageVersion items: {0}

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid config key in config section.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' is not a valid config key in config section.

trans-unit.source: Central Package Management configuration error: Could not find PackageVersion for package {0}
trans-unit.target: Central Package Management configuration error: Could not find PackageVersion for package {0}
trans-unit.note: 0 - a package name Do not translate "PackageVersion"

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source, '{1}'. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with an 'HTTP' source, '{1}'. NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - server uri.

trans-unit.source: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: You are running the '{0}' operation with 'HTTP' sources: {1} NuGet requires HTTPS sources. To use HTTP sources, you must explicitly set 'allowInsecureConnections' to true in your NuGet.Config file. Refer to https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The command name. Ex. Push/Delete. 1 - list of server uris

trans-unit.source: Invalid culture identifier in {0} environment variable. Value read is '{1}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid culture identifier in {0} environment variable. Value read is '{1}'
trans-unit.note: 0 - Environment variable name, 1 - value set in environment variable

trans-unit.source: Invalid value `{0}` for option {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value `{0}` for option {1}.

trans-unit.source: The specified source '{0}' is invalid. Provide a valid source.
trans-unit.target: The specified source '{0}' is invalid. Provide a valid source.

trans-unit.source: Invalid version range '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Invalid version range '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Missing version from {0}
trans-unit.target: Missing version from {0}

trans-unit.source: MsBuild was unable to open Project '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: MsBuild was unable to open Project '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The directory '{0}' contains multiple project or solution files. Please specify which project or solution file to use.
trans-unit.target: The directory '{0}' contains multiple project or solution files. Please specify which project or solution file to use.

trans-unit.source: None or invalid DgSpec was passed to NuGet add package command.
trans-unit.target: None or invalid DgSpec was passed to NuGet add package command.

trans-unit.source: The directory '{0}' does not contain any project or solution files.
trans-unit.target: The directory '{0}' does not contain any project or solution files.

trans-unit.source: No package sources found.
trans-unit.target: No package sources found.

trans-unit.source: There are no versions available for the package '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: There are no versions available for the package '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The project `{0}` uses package.config for NuGet packages, while the command works only with package reference projects.
trans-unit.target: The project `{0}` uses package.config for NuGet packages, while the command works only with package reference projects.

trans-unit.source: The package {0} is not referenced by project {1}
trans-unit.target: The package {0} is not referenced by project {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package ID 1 - The project path

trans-unit.source: Missing or invalid path '{0}'. Please provide a path to a project, solution file, or directory.
trans-unit.target: Missing or invalid path '{0}'. Please provide a path to a project, solution file, or directory.

trans-unit.source: The specified path '{0}' does not exist.
trans-unit.target: The specified path '{0}' does not exist.

trans-unit.source: Unable to {0} package. Argument '{1}' not provided.
trans-unit.target: Unable to {0} package. Argument '{1}' not provided.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Operation Name {1} - Argument which was not provided

trans-unit.source: Unable to {0} package. Missing or Invalid project file '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to {0} package. Missing or Invalid project file '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The --prerelease and --version options are not supported in the same command.
trans-unit.target: The --prerelease and --version options are not supported in the same command.

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' does not have MSBuild property ProjectAssetsFile defined. This may indicate that this project does not support NuGet PackageReference, or that project customization has prevented the .NET SDK setting default values.
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' does not have MSBuild property ProjectAssetsFile defined. This may indicate that this project does not support NuGet PackageReference, or that project customization has prevented the .NET SDK setting default values.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Path to the project with the error

trans-unit.source: The certificate finger you're trying to add is already in the certificate fingerprint list.
trans-unit.target: The certificate finger you're trying to add is already in the certificate fingerprint list.

trans-unit.source: A trusted repository with the service index '{0}' already exists.
trans-unit.target: A trusted repository with the service index '{0}' already exists.

trans-unit.source: A trusted signer '{0}' already exists.
trans-unit.target: A trusted signer '{0}' already exists.

trans-unit.source: Error while adding package '{0}' to project '{1}'. The project does not support adding package references through the add package command.
trans-unit.target: Error while adding package '{0}' to project '{1}'. The project does not support adding package references through the add package command.

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' does not contain any PackageReference '{1}' to {2}.
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' does not contain any PackageReference '{1}' to {2}.
trans-unit.note: {0} - project path {1} - package id {2} - operation name

trans-unit.source: Forces the application to run using an invariant, English-based culture.
trans-unit.target: Forces the application to run using an invariant, English-based culture.

trans-unit.source: PackageReference for package '{0}' version '{1}' added to file '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: PackageReference for package '{0}' version '{1}' added to file '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Package Id {1} - package version {2} - project file path

trans-unit.source: Adding PackageReference for package '{0}' into project '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Adding PackageReference for package '{0}' into project '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: PackageReference for package '{0}' added to '{1}' and PackageVersion added to central package management file '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: PackageReference for package '{0}' added to '{1}' and PackageVersion added to central package management file '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package ID. 1 - Project file path. 2 - Directory.Packages.props.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' is compatible with all the specified frameworks in project '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' is compatible with all the specified frameworks in project '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Package '{0}' is compatible with a subset of the specified frameworks in project '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Package '{0}' is compatible with a subset of the specified frameworks in project '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: PackageReference for package '{0}' version '{1}' updated in file '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: PackageReference for package '{0}' version '{1}' updated in file '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Package Id {1} - package version {2} - project file path

trans-unit.source: Removing PackageReference for package '{0}' from project '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Removing PackageReference for package '{0}' from project '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Lists all the client certificates in the configuration.
trans-unit.target: Lists all the client certificates in the configuration.

trans-unit.source: (A) : Auto-referenced package.
trans-unit.target: (A) : Auto-referenced package.

trans-unit.source: A path to a config file to specify sources. Works only with `--outdated`.
trans-unit.target: A path to a config file to specify sources. Works only with `--outdated`.

trans-unit.source: Displays only the packages marked deprecated by the authors.
trans-unit.target: Displays only the packages marked deprecated by the authors.

trans-unit.source: Alternative
trans-unit.target: Alternative

trans-unit.source: Reason(s)
trans-unit.target: Reason(s)

trans-unit.source: Lists all the packages used by the current project(s).
trans-unit.target: Lists all the packages used by the current project(s).

trans-unit.source: The given file `{0}` was not found
trans-unit.target: The given file `{0}` was not found

trans-unit.source: Unable to read the assets file `{0}`. Please make sure the file has the write format.
trans-unit.target: Unable to read the assets file `{0}`. Please make sure the file has the write format.

trans-unit.source: Unable to read a package reference from the project `{0}`. Please make sure that your project file and project.assets.json file are in sync by running restore.
trans-unit.target: Unable to read a package reference from the project `{0}`. Please make sure that your project file and project.assets.json file are in sync by running restore.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the target framework for which the packages will be listed.
trans-unit.target: Specifies the target framework for which the packages will be listed.

trans-unit.source: Considers only the versions with matching major. Works only with `--outdated`.
trans-unit.target: Considers only the versions with matching major. Works only with `--outdated`.

trans-unit.source: Considers only the versions with matching minor and major. Works only with `--outdated`.
trans-unit.target: Considers only the versions with matching minor and major. Works only with `--outdated`.

trans-unit.source: Failed to parse one of the given frameworks. Please make sure the given frameworks are valid.
trans-unit.target: Failed to parse one of the given frameworks. Please make sure the given frameworks are valid.

trans-unit.source: Options '--outdated', '--deprecated' and '--vulnerable' cannot be combined.
trans-unit.target: Options '--outdated', '--deprecated' and '--vulnerable' cannot be combined.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value {0} provided for output format. The accepted values are {1}.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value {0} provided for output format. The accepted values are {1}.
trans-unit.note: {0} - argument name in format option {1} - the possible values of the argument.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported output format version {0} was requested. The accepted format version value is {1}.
trans-unit.target: Unsupported output format version {0} was requested. The accepted format version value is {1}.
trans-unit.note: {0} - argument name in version option {1} - the possible value of the argument.

trans-unit.source: Latest
trans-unit.target: Latest

trans-unit.source: The given project `{0}` has no deprecated packages given the current sources.
trans-unit.target: The given project `{0}` has no deprecated packages given the current sources.

trans-unit.target: No deprecated packages for this framework.

trans-unit.source: No packages were found for this framework.
trans-unit.target: No packages were found for this framework.

trans-unit.source: No packages were found for the project `{0}` given the specified frameworks.
trans-unit.target: No packages were found for the project `{0}` given the specified frameworks.

trans-unit.source: No package updates available for this framework.
trans-unit.target: No package updates available for this framework.

trans-unit.source: The given project `{0}` has no updates given the current sources.
trans-unit.target: The given project `{0}` has no updates given the current sources.

trans-unit.target: No vulnerable packages for this framework.

trans-unit.source: The given project `{0}` has no vulnerable packages given the current sources.
trans-unit.target: The given project `{0}` has no vulnerable packages given the current sources.

trans-unit.source: Not found at the sources
trans-unit.target: Not found at the sources

trans-unit.source: Displays only the packages that need updates with the latest version from the sources.
trans-unit.target: Displays only the packages that need updates with the latest version from the sources.

trans-unit.source: Set the report output format.
trans-unit.target: Set the report output format.

trans-unit.source: The version of report output.
trans-unit.target: The version of report output.

trans-unit.source: '--output-version' option not applicable for console output, it can only be used together with `--format json` option.
trans-unit.target: '--output-version' option not applicable for console output, it can only be used together with `--format json` option.

trans-unit.source: A path to a project, solution file or directory.
trans-unit.target: A path to a project, solution file or directory.

trans-unit.source: Considers prerelease versions when looking for latest. Works only with `--outdated`.
trans-unit.target: Considers prerelease versions when looking for latest. Works only with `--outdated`.

trans-unit.target: Requested

trans-unit.target: Resolved

trans-unit.target: Sources to lookup for latest versions. Works only with `--outdated`.

trans-unit.source: The following sources were used:
trans-unit.target: The following sources were used:

trans-unit.target: Top-level Package

trans-unit.target: Includes transitive packages too in the result.

trans-unit.target: Transitive Package

trans-unit.source: Advisory URL
trans-unit.target: Advisory URL

trans-unit.source: Severity
trans-unit.target: Severity

trans-unit.source: Displays only the packages flagged as vulnerable.
trans-unit.target: Displays only the packages flagged as vulnerable.

trans-unit.source: The command option(s) '--include-prerelease', '--highest-minor', and '--highest-patch' are ignored by this command.
trans-unit.target: The command option(s) '--include-prerelease', '--highest-minor', and '--highest-patch' are ignored by this command.

trans-unit.source: Lists all configured NuGet sources.
trans-unit.target: Lists all configured NuGet sources.

trans-unit.source: List configured NuGet sources.
trans-unit.target: List configured NuGet sources.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the cache location(s) to list or clear. <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp>
trans-unit.target: Specifies the cache location(s) to list or clear. <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp>

trans-unit.source: Clear the selected local resources or cache location(s).
trans-unit.target: Clear the selected local resources or cache location(s).

trans-unit.source: Clears or lists local NuGet resources such as http requests cache, packages folder, plugin operations cache or machine-wide global packages folder.
trans-unit.target: Clears or lists local NuGet resources such as http requests cache, packages folder, plugin operations cache or machine-wide global packages folder.

trans-unit.source: List the selected local resources or cache location(s).
trans-unit.target: List the selected local resources or cache location(s).

trans-unit.source: Both operations, --list and --clear, are not supported in the same command. Please specify only one operation. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference
trans-unit.target: Both operations, --list and --clear, are not supported in the same command. Please specify only one operation. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference

trans-unit.source: No Cache Type was specified. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference
trans-unit.target: No Cache Type was specified. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference

trans-unit.source: Please specify an operation i.e. --list or --clear. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference
trans-unit.target: Please specify an operation i.e. --list or --clear. usage: NuGet locals <all | http-cache | global-packages | temp | plugins-cache> [--clear | -c | --list | -l] For more information, visit https://docs.nuget.org/docs/reference/command-line-reference

trans-unit.source: Does not append "api/v2/package" to the source URL.
trans-unit.target: Does not append "api/v2/package" to the source URL.

trans-unit.source: If a symbols package exists, it will not be pushed to a symbols server.
trans-unit.target: If a symbols package exists, it will not be pushed to a symbols server.

trans-unit.source: Do not prompt for user input or confirmations.
trans-unit.target: Do not prompt for user input or confirmations.

trans-unit.source: Allow the command to block and require manual action for operations like authentication.
trans-unit.target: Allow the command to block and require manual action for operations like authentication.

trans-unit.source: The NuGet configuration file. If specified, only the settings from this file will be used. If not specified, the hierarchy of configuration files from the current directory will be used. For more information, see https://docs.microsoft.com/nuget/consume-packages/configuring-nuget-behavior.
trans-unit.target: The NuGet configuration file. If specified, only the settings from this file will be used. If not specified, the hierarchy of configuration files from the current directory will be used. For more information, see https://docs.microsoft.com/nuget/consume-packages/configuring-nuget-behavior.

trans-unit.source: Search method to find certificate in certificate store (see docs).
trans-unit.target: Search method to find certificate in certificate store (see docs).

trans-unit.source: Search the certificate store for the supplied value. Used with FindValue (see docs).
trans-unit.target: Search the certificate store for the supplied value. Used with FindValue (see docs).

trans-unit.source: Skip certificate validation.
trans-unit.target: Skip certificate validation.

trans-unit.source: Package source name.
trans-unit.target: Package source name.

trans-unit.source: Password for the certificate, if needed.
trans-unit.target: Password for the certificate, if needed.

trans-unit.source: Path to certificate file.
trans-unit.target: Path to certificate file.

trans-unit.source: Certificate store location (see docs).
trans-unit.target: Certificate store location (see docs).

trans-unit.source: Certificate store name (see docs).
trans-unit.target: Certificate store name (see docs).

trans-unit.source: Enables storing password for the certificate by disabling password encryption.
trans-unit.target: Enables storing password for the certificate by disabling password encryption.

trans-unit.source: {0} Version: {1}
trans-unit.target: {0} Version: {1}

trans-unit.source: Update referenced packages in a project or solution.
trans-unit.target: Update referenced packages in a project or solution.

trans-unit.source: Path to a project or solution file, or a directory.
trans-unit.target: Path to a project or solution file, or a directory.

trans-unit.source: All packages are already up to date.
trans-unit.target: All packages are already up to date.

trans-unit.source: Updated {0} packages in {1} scanned packages.
trans-unit.target: Updated {0} packages in {1} scanned packages.
trans-unit.note: {0}: Number of packages updated {1}: Package checked for updated versions

trans-unit.source: Finding versions of packages to update.
trans-unit.target: Finding versions of packages to update.

trans-unit.source: Loading Project(s).
trans-unit.target: Loading Project(s).

trans-unit.source: Package reference in the form of a package identifier like 'Newtonsoft.Json' or package identifier and version separated by '@' like 'Newtonsoft.Json@13.0.3'.
trans-unit.target: Package reference in the form of a package identifier like 'Newtonsoft.Json' or package identifier and version separated by '@' like 'Newtonsoft.Json@13.0.3'.

trans-unit.source: Running preview restore to check package compatibility.
trans-unit.target: Running preview restore to check package compatibility.

trans-unit.source: Preview restore with updated packages was not successful. Force mode is not yet available.
trans-unit.target: Preview restore with updated packages was not successful. Force mode is not yet available.

trans-unit.source: Updated {0} {1} to {2}.
trans-unit.target: Updated {0} {1} to {2}.
trans-unit.note: {0}: package id {1}: existing version {2}: new version

trans-unit.source: Updating outdated packages in {0}.
trans-unit.target: Updating outdated packages in {0}.
trans-unit.note: {0}: the project or solution that is being updated

trans-unit.source: There are no stable versions available, {0} is the best available. Consider adding the --prerelease option
trans-unit.target: There are no stable versions available, {0} is the best available. Consider adding the --prerelease option

trans-unit.source: If a package and version already exists, skip it and continue with the next package in the push, if any.
trans-unit.target: If a package and version already exists, skip it and continue with the next package in the push, if any.

trans-unit.source: Pushes a package to the server and publishes it.
trans-unit.target: Pushes a package to the server and publishes it.

trans-unit.source: Invalid timeout parameter value.
trans-unit.target: Invalid timeout parameter value.

trans-unit.source: Please specify the path to the package.
trans-unit.target: Please specify the path to the package.

trans-unit.source: Specify the path to the package and your API key to push the package to the server.
trans-unit.target: Specify the path to the package and your API key to push the package to the server.

trans-unit.source: Timeout for pushing to a server in seconds. Defaults to 300 seconds (5 minutes).
trans-unit.target: Timeout for pushing to a server in seconds. Defaults to 300 seconds (5 minutes).

trans-unit.source: Pushing took too long. You can change the default timeout of 300 seconds by using the --timeout <seconds> option with the push command.
trans-unit.target: Pushing took too long. You can change the default timeout of 300 seconds by using the --timeout <seconds> option with the push command.

trans-unit.source: Removes the client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.
trans-unit.target: Removes the client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.

trans-unit.source: Removes a package reference from a project.
trans-unit.target: Removes a package reference from a project.

trans-unit.source: Id of the package to be removed.
trans-unit.target: Id of the package to be removed.

trans-unit.source: Path to the project file.
trans-unit.target: Path to the project file.

trans-unit.source: Remove a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Remove a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Remove a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Remove a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: SHA-256, SHA-384 or SHA-512 fingerprint of the certificate used to search a local certificate store for the certificate. The certificate store can be specified by --certificate-store-name and --certificate-store-location options.
trans-unit.target: SHA-256, SHA-384 or SHA-512 fingerprint of the certificate used to search a local certificate store for the certificate. The certificate store can be specified by --certificate-store-name and --certificate-store-location options.

trans-unit.source: Password for the certificate, if needed. This option can be used to specify the password for the certificate. The command will throw an error message if certificate is password protected but password is not provided as input.
trans-unit.target: Password for the certificate, if needed. This option can be used to specify the password for the certificate. The command will throw an error message if certificate is password protected but password is not provided as input.

trans-unit.source: File path to the certificate to be used while signing the package.
trans-unit.target: File path to the certificate to be used while signing the package.

trans-unit.source: Name of the X.509 certificate store use to search for the certificate. Defaults to "CurrentUser", the X.509 certificate store used by the current user. This option should be used when specifying the certificate via --certificate-subject-name or --certificate-fingerprint options.
trans-unit.target: Name of the X.509 certificate store use to search for the certificate. Defaults to "CurrentUser", the X.509 certificate store used by the current user. This option should be used when specifying the certificate via --certificate-subject-name or --certificate-fingerprint options.

trans-unit.source: Name of the X.509 certificate store to use to search for the certificate. Defaults to "My", the X.509 certificate store for personal certificates. This option should be used when specifying the certificate via --certificate-subject-name or --certificate-fingerprint options.
trans-unit.target: Name of the X.509 certificate store to use to search for the certificate. Defaults to "My", the X.509 certificate store for personal certificates. This option should be used when specifying the certificate via --certificate-subject-name or --certificate-fingerprint options.

trans-unit.source: Subject name of the certificate used to search a local certificate store for the certificate. The search is a case-insensitive string comparison using the supplied value, which will find all certificates with the subject name containing that string, regardless of other subject values. The certificate store can be specified by --certificate-store-name and --certificate-store-location options.
trans-unit.target: Subject name of the certificate used to search a local certificate store for the certificate. The search is a case-insensitive string comparison using the supplied value, which will find all certificates with the subject name containing that string, regardless of other subject values. The certificate store can be specified by --certificate-store-name and --certificate-store-location options.

trans-unit.source: Signs NuGet package(s) at <package-paths> with the specified certificate.
trans-unit.target: Signs NuGet package(s) at <package-paths> with the specified certificate.

trans-unit.source: Hash algorithm to be used to sign the package. Defaults to SHA256.
trans-unit.target: Hash algorithm to be used to sign the package. Defaults to SHA256.

trans-unit.source: {0}: Invalid value for '--certificate-fingerprint' option. The value must be a SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512 certificate fingerprint (in hexadecimal).
trans-unit.target: {0}: Invalid value for '--certificate-fingerprint' option. The value must be a SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512 certificate fingerprint (in hexadecimal).

trans-unit.source: Multiple options were used to specify a certificate.
trans-unit.target: Multiple options were used to specify a certificate.

trans-unit.source: No certificate was provided.
trans-unit.target: No certificate was provided.

trans-unit.source: The '--timestamper' option was not provided. The signed package will not be timestamped. To learn more about this option, please visit https://docs.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/tools
trans-unit.target: The '--timestamper' option was not provided. The signed package will not be timestamped. To learn more about this option, please visit https://docs.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/tools

trans-unit.source: Directory where the signed package(s) should be saved. By default the original package is overwritten by the signed package.
trans-unit.target: Directory where the signed package(s) should be saved. By default the original package is overwritten by the signed package.

trans-unit.source: Switch to indicate if the current signature should be overwritten. By default the command will fail if the package already has a signature.
trans-unit.target: Switch to indicate if the current signature should be overwritten. By default the command will fail if the package already has a signature.

trans-unit.source: Signs NuGet packages at <package-paths> with the specified certificate.
trans-unit.target: Signs NuGet packages at <package-paths> with the specified certificate.

trans-unit.source: Hash algorithm to be used by the RFC 3161 timestamp server. Defaults to SHA256.
trans-unit.target: Hash algorithm to be used by the RFC 3161 timestamp server. Defaults to SHA256.

trans-unit.source: URL to an RFC 3161 timestamping server.
trans-unit.target: URL to an RFC 3161 timestamping server.

trans-unit.source: Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.
trans-unit.target: Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package source name) to use. Defaults to DefaultPushSource if specified in NuGet.Config.

trans-unit.source: Allows HTTP connections for adding or updating packages. Note: This method is not secure. For secure options, see https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.
trans-unit.target: Allows HTTP connections for adding or updating packages. Note: This method is not secure. For secure options, see https://aka.ms/nuget-https-everywhere for more information.

trans-unit.source: The format of the list command output: `Detailed` (the default) and `Short`.
trans-unit.target: The format of the list command output: `Detailed` (the default) and `Short`.

trans-unit.source: Name of the source.
trans-unit.target: Name of the source.

trans-unit.source: Password to be used when connecting to an authenticated source.
trans-unit.target: Password to be used when connecting to an authenticated source.

trans-unit.source: The NuGet server protocol version to be used. Currently supported versions are 2 and 3. See https://learn.microsoft.com/nuget/api/overview for information about the version 3 protocol. Defaults to 2 if not specified.
trans-unit.target: The NuGet server protocol version to be used. Currently supported versions are 2 and 3. See https://learn.microsoft.com/nuget/api/overview for information about the version 3 protocol. Defaults to 2 if not specified.

trans-unit.source: Path to the package source.
trans-unit.target: Path to the package source.

trans-unit.source: Enables storing portable package source credentials by disabling password encryption.
trans-unit.target: Enables storing portable package source credentials by disabling password encryption.

trans-unit.source: Username to be used when connecting to an authenticated source.
trans-unit.target: Username to be used when connecting to an authenticated source.

trans-unit.source: Comma-separated list of valid authentication types for this source. Set this to basic if the server advertises NTLM or Negotiate and your credentials must be sent using the Basic mechanism, for instance when using a PAT with on-premises Azure DevOps Server. Other valid values include negotiate, kerberos, ntlm, and digest, but these values are unlikely to be useful.
trans-unit.target: Comma-separated list of valid authentication types for this source. Set this to basic if the server advertises NTLM or Negotiate and your credentials must be sent using the Basic mechanism, for instance when using a PAT with on-premises Azure DevOps Server. Other valid values include negotiate, kerberos, ntlm, and digest, but these values are unlikely to be useful.
trans-unit.note: Please don't localize "basic, NTLM, Negotiate, kerberos, ntlm, digest"

trans-unit.source: The protocol version specified is invalid. Provide a valid protocol version.
trans-unit.target: The protocol version specified is invalid. Provide a valid protocol version.

trans-unit.source: The proper command is '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The proper command is '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The API key for the symbol server.
trans-unit.target: The API key for the symbol server.

trans-unit.source: Symbol server URL to use.
trans-unit.target: Symbol server URL to use.

trans-unit.source: Adds a trusted signer with the given name, based on the author signature of the package.
trans-unit.target: Adds a trusted signer with the given name, based on the author signature of the package.

trans-unit.source: The fingerprint of the certificate.
trans-unit.target: The fingerprint of the certificate.

trans-unit.source: Specifies the hash algorithm used to calculate the certificate fingerprint. Defaults to SHA256. Values supported are SHA256, SHA384 and SHA512.
trans-unit.target: Specifies the hash algorithm used to calculate the certificate fingerprint. Defaults to SHA256. Values supported are SHA256, SHA384 and SHA512.

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the certificate for the trusted signer should be allowed to chain to an untrusted root. This is not recommended.
trans-unit.target: Specifies if the certificate for the trusted signer should be allowed to chain to an untrusted root. This is not recommended.

trans-unit.source: Manage the trusted signers.
trans-unit.target: Manage the trusted signers.

trans-unit.source: Semi-colon separated list of trusted owners to further restrict the trust of a repository.
trans-unit.target: Semi-colon separated list of trusted owners to further restrict the trust of a repository.

trans-unit.source: Lists all the trusted signers in the configuration.
trans-unit.target: Lists all the trusted signers in the configuration.

trans-unit.source: The given package should be a local path to the signed .nupkg file.
trans-unit.target: The given package should be a local path to the signed .nupkg file.

trans-unit.source: Removes any trusted signers that match the given name.
trans-unit.target: Removes any trusted signers that match the given name.

trans-unit.source: Adds a trusted signer with the given name, based on the repository signature or countersignature of a signed package.
trans-unit.target: Adds a trusted signer with the given name, based on the repository signature or countersignature of a signed package.

trans-unit.source: Adds a trusted signer based on a given package source.
trans-unit.target: Adds a trusted signer based on a given package source.

trans-unit.source: "The name of the trusted signer to add. If only <NAME> is provided without --<source-url>, the package source from your NuGet configuration files with the same name is added to the trusted list. If <NAME> already exists in the configuration, the package source is appended to it."
trans-unit.target: "The name of the trusted signer to add. If only <NAME> is provided without --<source-url>, the package source from your NuGet configuration files with the same name is added to the trusted list. If <NAME> already exists in the configuration, the package source is appended to it."

trans-unit.source: If a source-url is provided, it must be a v3 package source URL (like https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json). Other package source types are not supported.
trans-unit.target: If a source-url is provided, it must be a v3 package source URL (like https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json). Other package source types are not supported.

trans-unit.source: Deletes the current list of certificates and replaces them with an up-to-date list from the repository.
trans-unit.target: Deletes the current list of certificates and replaces them with an up-to-date list from the repository.

trans-unit.source: The name of the trusted signer to add. If a trusted signer with the given name already exists, the certificate item is added to that signer. Otherwise a trusted author is created with a certificate item from the given certificate information.
trans-unit.target: The name of the trusted signer to add. If a trusted signer with the given name already exists, the certificate item is added to that signer. Otherwise a trusted author is created with a certificate item from the given certificate information.

trans-unit.source: The name of the existing trusted signer to sync.
trans-unit.target: The name of the existing trusted signer to sync.

trans-unit.source: The name of the trusted signer to add. If name already exists in the configuration, the signature is appended.
trans-unit.target: The name of the trusted signer to add. If name already exists in the configuration, the signature is appended.

trans-unit.source: The name of the existing trusted signer to remove.
trans-unit.target: The name of the existing trusted signer to remove.

trans-unit.source: Unsupported: Projects using Package Source Mapping are not yet supported
trans-unit.target: Unsupported: Projects using Package Source Mapping are not yet supported

trans-unit.source: The package {0} references different versions of the package for different target frameworks. This is not supported by this command. Please edit the project file directly. ({1})
trans-unit.target: The package {0} references different versions of the package for different target frameworks. This is not supported by this command. Please edit the project file directly. ({1})
trans-unit.note: 0 - The package id 1 - The project path

trans-unit.source: Unsupported: Updating more than one project is not yet supported
trans-unit.target: Unsupported: Updating more than one project is not yet supported

trans-unit.source: Unsupported: Upgrading all packages in a project is not yet supported
trans-unit.target: Unsupported: Upgrading all packages in a project is not yet supported

trans-unit.source: Updates the client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.
trans-unit.target: Updates the client certificate configuration that matches the given package source name.

trans-unit.source: Update a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Update a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Update a NuGet source.
trans-unit.target: Update a NuGet source.

trans-unit.source: Set the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].
trans-unit.target: Set the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].

trans-unit.source: Specifies that all verifications possible should be performed to the package(s).
trans-unit.target: Specifies that all verifications possible should be performed to the package(s).

trans-unit.source: Verify that the signer certificate matches with one of the specified SHA256 fingerprints. A certificate SHA256 fingerprint is a SHA256 hash of the certificate used to identify the certificate. Multiple inputs should be separated by space.
trans-unit.target: Verify that the signer certificate matches with one of the specified SHA256 fingerprints. A certificate SHA256 fingerprint is a SHA256 hash of the certificate used to identify the certificate. Multiple inputs should be separated by space.

trans-unit.source: Verifies a signed NuGet package.
trans-unit.target: Verifies a signed NuGet package.

trans-unit.source: Specify the path to the package
trans-unit.target: Specify the path to the package

trans-unit.source: --no-restore|-n flag was used. No compatibility check will be done and the added package reference will be unconditional.
trans-unit.target: --no-restore|-n flag was used. No compatibility check will be done and the added package reference will be unconditional.

trans-unit.source: The package {0} is already referencing the highest version {1} in project {2}
trans-unit.target: The package {0} is already referencing the highest version {1} in project {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 - package id 1 - version string 2 - project path

trans-unit.source: Package {0} is already referencing version {1}
trans-unit.target: Package {0} is already referencing version {1}

trans-unit.source: Audit source '{0}' did not provide any vulnerability data.
trans-unit.target: Audit source '{0}' did not provide any vulnerability data.

trans-unit.source: Shows the dependency graph for a particular package for a given project or solution.
trans-unit.target: Shows the dependency graph for a particular package for a given project or solution.

trans-unit.source: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why'. The '{0}' argument cannot be empty.
trans-unit.target: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why'. The '{0}' argument cannot be empty.

trans-unit.source: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why'. {0}
trans-unit.target: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why'. {0}

trans-unit.source: The file '{0}' does not appear to be a NuGet assets file. Please run restore for project '{1}' before running this command.
trans-unit.target: The file '{0}' does not appear to be a NuGet assets file. Please run restore for project '{1}' before running this command.

trans-unit.source: The file '{0}' does not appear to be a NuGet assets file. For more information, see https://aka.ms/dotnet/nuget/why#older-project-format
trans-unit.target: The file '{0}' does not appear to be a NuGet assets file. For more information, see https://aka.ms/dotnet/nuget/why#older-project-format

trans-unit.source: The target framework(s) for which dependency graphs are shown.
trans-unit.target: The target framework(s) for which dependency graphs are shown.

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' has the following dependency graph(s) for '{1}':
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' has the following dependency graph(s) for '{1}':

trans-unit.source: No dependency graph(s) found for this target framework.
trans-unit.target: No dependency graph(s) found for this target framework.

trans-unit.source: Project '{0}' does not have a dependency on '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Project '{0}' does not have a dependency on '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why' for project '{0}'. See https://aka.ms/dotnet/nuget/why#older-project-format
trans-unit.target: Unable to run 'dotnet nuget why' for project '{0}'. See https://aka.ms/dotnet/nuget/why#older-project-format

trans-unit.source: The package name to lookup in the dependency graph.
trans-unit.target: The package name to lookup in the dependency graph.

trans-unit.source: A path to a project, solution file, or directory.
trans-unit.target: A path to a project, solution file, or directory.

trans-unit.source: The assets file '{0}' for project '{1}' does not contain a target for the specified input framework '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: The assets file '{0}' for project '{1}' does not contain a target for the specified input framework '{2}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} - Assets file path, {1} - Project name, {2} - Framework

trans-unit.source: Searches one or more package sources for packages that match a search term. If no sources are specified, all sources defined in the NuGet.Config are used.
trans-unit.target: Searches one or more package sources for packages that match a search term. If no sources are specified, all sources defined in the NuGet.Config are used.

trans-unit.source: Require that the search term exactly match the name of the package. Causes `--take` and `--skip` options to be ignored.
trans-unit.target: Require that the search term exactly match the name of the package. Causes `--take` and `--skip` options to be ignored.

trans-unit.source: Format the output accordingly. Either `table`, or `json`. The default value is `table`.
trans-unit.target: Format the output accordingly. Either `table`, or `json`. The default value is `table`.

trans-unit.source: Stop and wait for user input or action (for example to complete authentication).
trans-unit.target: Stop and wait for user input or action (for example to complete authentication).

trans-unit.source: Include prerelease packages.
trans-unit.target: Include prerelease packages.

trans-unit.source: Number of results to skip, to allow pagination. Default 0.
trans-unit.target: Number of results to skip, to allow pagination. Default 0.

trans-unit.source: Package source to search. You can pass multiple `--source` options to search multiple package sources. Example: `--source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json`.
trans-unit.target: Package source to search. You can pass multiple `--source` options to search multiple package sources. Example: `--source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json`.

trans-unit.source: Number of results to return. Default 20.
trans-unit.target: Number of results to return. Default 20.

trans-unit.source: Display this amount of details in the output: `normal`, `minimal`, `detailed`. The default is `normal`.
trans-unit.target: Display this amount of details in the output: `normal`, `minimal`, `detailed`. The default is `normal`.

trans-unit.source: Search term to filter package names, descriptions, and tags. Used as a literal value. Example: `dotnet package search some.package`. See also `--exact-match`.
trans-unit.target: Search term to filter package names, descriptions, and tags. Used as a literal value. Example: `dotnet package search some.package`. See also `--exact-match`.
